extortion.description: [AI generated] Polaris Transport is a Canadian company specializing in cross-border cargo shipping. With a trucking fleet equipped with advanced technology, they provide efficient and reliable ground transportation solutions across North America. Their services range from less-than-truckload (LTL) to full truckload, heated service, and expedited transport. They also offer warehousing and distribution services. Constantly striving for high-quality customer service, their focus is on safety and punctuality.
